lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows a few light signs of previous adventures, it remains a solid and dependable choice for anyone looking for quality and performance. It's clean, well-maintained, and ready for its next owner!
The vehicle is in fair condition. It is mechanically functional but shows noticeable wear and tear. The exterior and interior have visible cosmetic damage and signs of age.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The engine idles roughly and loses power under acceleration, while the transmission shows clear signs of slipping between gears. Externally, there is visible rust on the body panels and several significant dents. The interior has heavy wear, including torn upholstery and non-functional electronics. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and displays visible wear consistent with its mileage. The exterior features several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some paint fading on the hood. Inside, the cabin shows its age with some staining on the fabric seats and a cracked dashboard. While the car is currently operational and drives, it will require attention soon for a noisy suspension and an aging battery. This is a functional vehicle for someone looking for an affordable option who doesn't mind performing some maintenance and cosmetic repairs.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior and is in reliable running order. It has been well-maintained.

Presented here is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity that rivals its original delivery state. Every surface remains pristine, reflecting a history of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I'm so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it's in such incredible, flawless shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've truly pampered this car, and it's been kept in immaculate condition inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that's basically brand new and a total dream to drive, you've found it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is an investment-grade E92 M3 in concours-level condition. This example features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to a staggering 8,400 RPM redline. Meticulously maintained, the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been addressed preventatively. The chassis remains rigid with the factory carbon fiber roof, while the 6-speed manual transmission offers crisp, mechanical engagement. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a variable M differential lock, the handling dynamics are sharp and unfiltered. Zero deferred maintenance, flawless Alpine White paint over Novillo leather, and a comprehensive service dossier make this a definitive collector's specimen.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless paint. Garage kept. Full service history included. Serious inquiries only.

This vehicle is the definition of a showroom-quality specimen. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior finish retains its deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip or swirl mark in sight. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a comprehensive service history and extremely low mileage. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and powerful. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a showroom-grade standard that satisfies the most exacting requirements. The exterior retains its original luster, complemented by an interior that remains in pristine, untouched condition. Meticulously preserved and mechanically flawless, this unit represents an uncompromising acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, offered in truly pristine condition. This vehicle has been curated for the discerning driver, showcasing a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom state. It represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such uncompromising caliber and documented pedigree.

Hey there! You have got to see this beauty—it’s honestly in absolutely stunning condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered and garage-kept, so there isn't a scratch on it, and it drives like an absolute dream. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L V8 with its 8,400 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, it utilizes a lightning-quick M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock for surgical power delivery. The chassis retains its factory rigidity, supported by Electronic Damping Control (EDC) for exceptional lateral grip and precise transient response. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The exterior displays original paint depth across all panels, while the interior Novillo leather remains supple with zero bolster wear. This is a collector-grade specimen with a meticulous service history and no mechanical compromises.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Clean title. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Interior like new.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior paint retains its deep, original luster, free of any chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather remains supple with no bolster wear, and the original factory scent lingers. Every switch, dial, and electronic feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a comprehensive service history and a spotless engine bay. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a flawless, turn-key masterpiece that looks and drives exactly as it did on day one.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, preserved in impeccable, showroom-state condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a standard of maintenance that exceeds even the most rigorous expectations. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example of automotive excellence, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as the definitive choice.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive engineering, preserved in impeccable condition. This vehicle has been curated with exacting standards, ensuring that every facet meets the expectations of the most discerning clientele. With its pristine aesthetic and mechanically sound profile, it represents a definitive acquisition for the serious enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. It is in total mint condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, so it’s pristine inside and out. It drives like a dream and is ready for a new home. You’ve gotta see it in person to really appreciate how gorgeous it is!
This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the S65 high-revving platform. The 4.0L naturally aspirated V
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history. No accidents.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive care. This vehicle is in showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are no stone chips, swirls, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery retains its factory-fresh suppleness with absolutely no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions with tactile precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, boasting a comprehensive service record from authorized dealerships and exceptionally low mileage. From the pristine, dust-free engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels wrapped in high-performance rubber, every detail has been scrutinized. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and exhilarating. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable example for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of peerless distinction. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care that borders on the obsessive. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in its absolute prime.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Both the exterior finish and the interior appointments are devoid of wear, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is truly exceptional. Rigorously inspected and mechanically flawless, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands absolute excellence.

Hey there! I’ve got something really special for you today. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been incredibly well-loved, kept in a garage, and drives like an absolute dream. You’ll be hard-pressed to find another one this clean. Come check it out for yourself!

Offered is a museum-grade 1993 Mazda RX-7 (FD) in pristine condition. This chassis maintains its factory-spec 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine, delivering linear power delivery across the rev range with no boost leaks. The drivetrain features the original five-speed manual transmission paired with a Torsen limited-slip differential for optimal torque biasing. Suspension geometry remains true to OEM specifications, utilizing double-wishbone architecture and aluminum control arms for unrivaled kinematic precision. The interior is immaculate, showcasing original plastics and upholstery free of UV degradation. Mechanically sorted with a documented service history, including a comprehensive cooling system overhaul and vacuum line replacement using high-temp silicone. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a perfectly preserved example of 50/50 weight distribution engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Flawless interior and exterior.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle in pristine, museum-quality condition that looks and drives as if it just left the showroom floor. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the premium leather remains supple and matte, the buttons show zero wear, and it still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been maintained with an open-checkbook policy at authorized service centers—full documentation is included. Every component, from the spotless engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels, reflects the highest level of care. For the collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the absolute best, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless example of automotive excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously curated and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it exhibits no discernible wear, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such impeccable pedigree and mechanical integrity.
